title: ESM Packaging, Exports, Executable Entry, Artifact Inspection, and Platform Support · Type-System Trace: Pokedex Ts Bin Entry
summary: The command runs only through tsx in the source tree, package exports expose internals, the bin entry points at TypeScript, files include fixtures and secrets, and support claims ignore Node and OS behavior. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. steps.title: Predict Pokedex Ts Bin Entry
steps.instruction:
